2606.15288.title: Hybrid NARX-LLM for Greenland Iceberg Discharge: Prompt-Driven Residual Correction
2606.15288.paper_summary: Greenland iceberg discharge exhibits complex nonlinear dynamics with limited observability, challenging traditional predictive models. We present a Hybrid NARX-LLM framework that combines a nonlinear autoregressive model with exogenous inputs (NARX) and a large language model (LLM) for residual correction. We further propose a Physics-Informed Prompt (PIP) method that transforms unstructured physical knowledge into structured prompts for zero-shot in-context reasoning. The primary objective is to explore the corrective potential of this framework for modeling Greenland iceberg discharge, rather than merely optimizing predictive accuracy. The NARX component captures intrinsic temporal dependencies, while the LLM, guided by PIP, encodes glacier dynamics and environmental drivers and perceives key trend patterns to correct systematic prediction errors. This integration allows the model to reason about unmodeled factors and produce interpretable residuals, enhancing overall predictive accuracy. Applied to Greenland iceberg discharge time series, our approach addresses extreme events that are difficult to predict due to rare variations and nonstationary trends, a limitation often overlooked by traditional methods. By fusing structured time-series modeling with knowledge-driven foundation AI, the framework offers a scalable and interpretable pathway to bridge data-limited climate forecasting with physics-informed LLM reasoning. The code is available.
2606.15288.paper_summary_zh: 格林蘭冰山排放顯示出複雜的非線性動態，且觀測性有限，這對傳統預測模型構成挑戰。<lb/>我們提出了一個混合 NARX-LLM 框架，將帶有外部輸入的非線性自回歸模型（NARX）與大型語言模型（LLM）結合，用於殘差校正。<lb/>我們進一步提出了一種物理知識引導提示（PIP）方法，將非結構化的物理知識轉化為結構化的提示，以便進行零樣本的上下文推理。<lb/>主要目標是探索這一框架在建模格林蘭冰山排放方面的校正潛力，而不僅僅是優化預測準確性。<lb/>NARX 組件捕捉內在的時間依賴性，而 LLM 在 PIP 的指導下，編碼冰川動態和環境驅動因素，並感知關鍵趨勢模式以修正系統性預測誤差。<lb/>這一整合使模型能夠推理未建模的因素並生成可解釋的殘差，從而提高整體預測準確性。<lb/>應用於格林蘭冰山排放時間序列，我們的方法解決了由於稀有變化和非平穩趨勢而難以預測的極端事件，這是傳統方法經常忽視的限制。<lb/>通過將結構化時間序列建模與知識驅動的基礎 AI 相結合，該框架提供了一條可擴展且可解釋的途徑，以橋接數據有限的氣候預測與物理知識引導的 LLM 推理。<lb/>代碼已公開。
2606.15288.author: Yiquan Gao et.al.
